Home / Analytics & Product Tracking / Umami

Umami — open source alternative

Self-hosted privacy-focused analytics.

Strengths

  • Easy docker deploy with Postgres/MySQL.
  • Clean UI and fast dashboard.
  • Multi-website support out of the box.

Weaknesses

  • Less detailed than Matomo for heavy analysis.
  • Smaller integration ecosystem.
  • No built-in alerting.
License: MIT Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Umami is used as an alternative to

Google Analytics

Google's free website and app analytics.

See all alternatives →

Mixpanel

Product analytics and funnels.

See all alternatives →
